message:
refactor(sync): simplify generation-changed waiter removal and add coverage

Revert the baton-passing logic on generation-changed waiter removal —
when a waiter observes a generation change, it simply removes itself
and drops the lock. The previous baton-pass was causing token
duplication when broadcast notifications covered notify_one waiters.
Remove unused _current_generation binding in Drop impl.

New test dropped_notify_one_waiter_covered_by_broadcast_does_not_
restore_token verifies that when a notify_one waiter is also covered
by a subsequent broadcast, dropping the waiter does not restore a
stored notification token, preventing spurious wakeups for future
waiters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
